articles.content: Under the legislation, lawmakers can still buy private stocks, keep stocks they already owned prior to entering Congress and maintain certain investment funds. Selling stock would require a seven-to-14-day advance notice. In the days leading up to the vote, a separate...

articles.content: Acting ministers David Neo and Jeffrey Siow will become full ministers in the Cabinet, Prime Minister Lawrence Wong said on Wednesday (July 22). Zaqy Mohamad has since taken over as Acting Minister of Muslim Affairs from Assoc Prof Faishal
